rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Tipografija imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk Rossijskaja natsional'naja biblioteka Tipografija imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk Tipografija imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk Tipografija imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

oa:Annotation.lawd:hasName: St ʾAbbā Yoḥanni of Dabra Sinā
the Three Children saved from the furnace

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: For priests, and for priests and righteous together
Sundays in the Season of Supplication (ʾAstamḥǝro)
